name: The Coral Forge Armory
description: An armory and weaponsmith shop selling weapons, armor, shields, Tidewarden equipment, and repairs.
publicSecret: Thorek served as a Tidewarden during his youth and fought during the Coral Rebellions nearly forty years ago.
dmSecret: Several months ago, Thorek repaired a damaged Tidewarden shield recovered from outside Atlantis. The shield belonged to a recruit officially listed as missing. When he reported the discrepancy, the shield was confiscated by Intelligence officers and the official records were altered shortly afterward.

name: Current & Cog Tinkery
description: An inventor and artificer supplier shop selling gadgets, tools, maps, navigation equipment, spyglasses, and experimental devices.
publicSecret: Several of Vexa's inventions have exploded repeatedly, including one incident involving the Merchant Guild Hall.
dmSecret: Vexa accidentally intercepted a damaged communication crystal several years ago. Before returning it, she viewed part of its contents. The message mentioned memory transfers and asset replacement.

name: Mooncurrent Tailors
description: A clothing shop selling common clothing, noble clothing, formal uniforms, cloaks, jewelry, and fashion accessories.
publicSecret: Elara knows every major scandal among Atlantis's noble families.
dmSecret: Several high-ranking government officials purchase custom clothing from Elara. She overhears conversations most citizens never hear and knows certain names disappear from conversation entirely.

name: Pearlroot Apothecary
description: An apothecary and healer selling healing potions, herbal remedies, antitoxins, alchemical ingredients, and medical supplies.
publicSecret: Nym treats half the market district for free. No one knows how she remains profitable.
dmSecret: Nym keeps extensive medical records. Several patients listed in her books officially do not exist. Others supposedly died years ago despite receiving treatment recently.

name: The Pearl Ledger
description: A general goods shop selling rope, packs, rations, travel supplies, adventuring gear, and miscellaneous equipment.
publicSecret: Sylla remembers every transaction ever made in her shop.
dmSecret: Sylla has observed government departments ordering unusual quantities of supplies to locations that officially do not exist. She keeps copies of every suspicious receipt.

name: The Gilded Kelp
description: Atlantis' most popular tavern, filled with warm lantern light, laughter, music, and questionable decisions.

name: The Salty Eel Tavern
description: The most profitable establishment in the Silvered Market.
